channel.title: Create Ubuntu VM Template :: Field SE Lab Guide
channel.description: Create the VM In PVE GUI > (left click) Datacenter > (right click) Node > Create VM General Choose Node Choose VM_id == 491 Type VM Name == Ubuntu-Template OS Use CD/DVD disc image Storage: <your Proxmox storage, if no NAS, then “local-lvm”> ISO Image: Ubuntu_Installer.iso Default values for ‘Guest OS’ (Linux 6.x – 2.6 Kernel) System
